case_title: GLENDA BONO VS. WILLIAM ALEX VEGAS SOTO

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BONO, GLENDA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY BONO, GLENDA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-09-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-09-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF GLENDA BONO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WILLIAM ALEX VEGAS SOTO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: LAUREN KRAMER SUJEETH; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-09-2024 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BONO, GLENDA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VEGAS SOTO, WILLIAM ALEX $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,000.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY BONO, GLENDA AS TO DEFENDANT VEGAS SOTO, WILLIAM ALEX ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-25-2024 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-25-2024 - CONTINUED DUE TO CONDITION OF THE COURTS CALENDAR TO FEB-06-2024 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF GLENDA BONO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WILLIAM ALEX VEGAS SOTO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: XXXXXXXX; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-06-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO FEB-09-2024 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF GLENDA BONO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WILLIAM ALEX VEGAS SOTO IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF STATES THE DEFENDANT WAS SERVED THE SECOND CLAIM ON CSM-23-867660 AT THE SAME TIME AS THE PROOF OF SERVICE ON CSM-23-867659. SHE WILL FILE THE SECOND PROOF OF SERVICE AHEAD OF THE 2/9/24 HEARING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED DEC-23-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT VEGAS SOTO, WILLIAM ALEX
